# A.R.C.

> Agentic Reasoning Core

The open-source Platform-in-a-Box for building, deploying, and orchestrating production-ready AI agents. One command. Zero weeks of infrastructure work.

## Table of Contents

### Guide

- [Getting Started](/arc-platform/docs/guide/getting-started.md)

- [LLM Testing](/arc-platform/docs/guide/llm-testing.md)
- [arc.yaml Reference](/arc-platform/docs/guide/arc-yaml-reference.md)
